items.title: Please miss me on any takes giving the Hornets ethical credit for moving on from Bridges. They played him as soon as they were allowed to and traded him when they were able to get a good return for him. They don't get to take any moral high ground here.

items.title: 2021: Phoenix Suns make the NBA Finals
items.author: Yossi Gozlan
items.body_excerpt:
2021: Phoenix Suns make the NBA Finals

2023: Devin Booker becomes the only player remaining from the Finals team with a completely new roster surrounding him.

2026: Booker now has another completely different roster from 3 years ago, with Royce O'Neale and Grayson Allen traded.

items.title: the suns went from being able to trade two first-round picks to being able to trade…two first-round picks, any one of which is significantly less valuable than an unprotected 2033 first.
items.author: dan favale
items.body_excerpt:
the suns went from being able to trade two first-round picks to being able to trade…two first-round picks, any one of which is significantly less valuable than an unprotected 2033 first.

smart front office maneuverability indeed.

images.alt:
By sacrificing a future 2033 first for a 2029 first, the Suns now have access to all picks 2027 through 2029, opening up potential trade avenues for Phoenix.

Smart front-office maneuverability.

items.title: Bonus Hollander POTD Jeff Malone. Miss St SG was drafted 10th by WAS in 83. Midrange master topped 20 ppg 6x, w/peak of 24.3 in 89-90. Tough to stop when hot. Traded to UTA in 90, where he was 3rd star thru 94. Finished up w/PHI, MIA & in Greece thru 96. Has done some coaching.

items.title: Im really curious if the Hornets
items.author: Sam DiGiovanni
items.body_excerpt:
Im really curious if the Hornets 
1) knew they were trading LaMelo and thought Anderson was as good as the other guard prospects
2) knew they were trading LaMelo but chose not to trade up for a better guard
Or 3) didn't think they were trading LaMelo but got an offer they couldn’t pass up

items.title: Wings try to add more pressure on Olivia Miles, hard show in P&R and Shepard holds. Miles looks to drive the other way and it's contained. Problem is the Lynx will keep it moving and once they get you in rotation it's tough.
items.author: Steve Jones
items.body_excerpt:
Wings try to add more pressure on Olivia Miles, hard show in P&R and Shepard holds. Miles looks to drive the other way and it's contained. Problem is the Lynx will keep it moving and once they get you in rotation it's tough. 

Reject vs the show opens the roll, pass, kick for 3

items.author: Yossi Gozlan

They can still make upgrades by trading up to two first-round picks: 2027 (lesser of CLE/MIN/UTA) and 2029 (also lesser of CLE/MIN/UTA).
